introduction: Hello, my name is Hongbin Lai. I am currently pursuing an M.S. at Peking University. My research interests lie in Multi-Agent Systems, LLM Agents, and Multimodal Learning for Molecular Recognition. As I am still at the beginning of my research journey, I am eager to learn, explore, and grow, and I would sincerely appreciate guidance, discussions, and opportunities for collaboration.

education.institution: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications
education.school: School of Computer Science (National Model Software College)

news.content: Our paper on Efficient Graph Continual Learning is accepted by ICML 2025 (Co-first Author).
Our paper MolRecBench-Wild received recommendation to CVPR 2026 Findings (Co-first Author).
Our paper StackPlanner is under review for ACL 2026 (Co-first Author).

publications.title: Efficient Graph Continual Learning via Lightweight Graph Neural Tangent Kernels-based Dataset Distillation
